generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech is making us vulnerable? While some argue for open collaboration, history shows that strategic autonomy is the only way to ensure our security. Countries that prioritize self-sufficiency in critical tech are better prepared for any crisis. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
